top3.sql:
WITH player_avg_runs AS (
    SELECT 
        p.player_id,
        p.player_name,
        p.country_name,
        SUM(bs.runs_scored) * 1.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT pb.match_id) AS avg_runs_per_match
    FROM player p
    JOIN player_match pm ON p.player_id = pm.player_id
    JOIN ball_by_ball pb ON pm.match_id = pb.match_id AND pm.player_id = pb.striker
    JOIN batsman_scored bs ON pb.match_id = bs.match_id 
        AND pb.over_id = bs.over_id 
        AND pb.ball_id = bs.ball_id 
        AND pb.innin...

WITH player_avg_runs AS (
    SELECT 
        p.player_id,
        p.player_name,
        p.country_name,
        SUM(bs.runs_scored) * 1.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT pmb.match_id) AS avg_runs_per_match
    FROM player p
    JOIN player_match pmb ON p.player_id = pmb.player_id
    JOIN ball_by_ball b ON pmb.match_id = b.match_id AND pmb.player_id = b.striker
    JOIN batsman_scored bs ON b.match_id = bs.match_id AND b.over_id = bs.over_id AND b.ball_id = bs.ball_id AND b.innings_no = bs.innings_no
    GRO...

WITH player_avg_runs AS (
    SELECT 
        p.player_id,
        p.player_name,
        p.country_name,
        SUM(bs.runs_scored) * 1.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT pb.match_id) AS avg_runs_per_match
    FROM player p
    JOIN player_match pm ON p.player_id = pm.player_id
    JOIN ball_by_ball pb ON pm.match_id = pb.match_id AND pm.player_id = pb.striker
    JOIN batsman_scored bs ON pb.match_id = bs.match_id 
        AND pb.over_id = bs.over_id 
        AND pb.ball_id = bs.ball_id 
        AND pb.innin...

WITH player_runs_per_match AS (
    SELECT 
        p.player_id,
        p.country_name,
        pb.match_id,
        COALESCE(SUM(bs.runs_scored), 0) AS runs_in_match
    FROM player p
    JOIN player_match pm ON p.player_id = pm.player_id
    JOIN ball_by_ball pb ON pm.match_id = pb.match_id AND pm.player_id = pb.striker
    LEFT JOIN batsman_scored bs ON pb.match_id = bs.match_id 
        AND pb.over_id = bs.over_id 
        AND pb.ball_id = bs.ball_id 
        AND pb.innings_no = bs.innings_...

WITH player_match_runs AS (
    SELECT 
        p.player_id,
        p.country_name,
        pmb.match_id,
        COALESCE(SUM(bs.runs_scored), 0) AS total_runs
    FROM player p
    JOIN player_match pmb ON p.player_id = pmb.player_id
    LEFT JOIN ball_by_ball b ON pmb.match_id = b.match_id AND p.player_id = b.striker
    LEFT JOIN batsman_scored bs ON b.match_id = bs.match_id 
        AND b.over_id = bs.over_id 
        AND b.ball_id = bs.ball_id 
        AND b.innings_no = bs.innings_no
   ...
